name: agent-skills
description: Production-grade engineering workflow skills for Codex, covering the full development lifecycle from idea refinement to launch.

interface.shortDescription: Lifecycle engineering workflows for Codex agents
interface.longDescription: Use Agent Skills to guide Codex through idea refinement, specification, planning, incremental implementation, TDD, debugging, source-grounded development, code review, security hardening, performance optimization, documentation, Git workflow, CI/CD, and launch readiness. This plugin adapts the upstream agent-skills methodology for Codex while preserving the bundled skill references and specialist review personas.
defaultPrompt: Turn this feature idea into a spec and plan.
Review this change across code, tests, and security.
Prepare this project for a safe launch.
